_comment: JS mutation testing (Stryker). Run with: make mutation-js (or npx stryker run). NOTE: meaningful only once Alpine/htmx component logic is extracted from inline templates into importable modules under couchpotato/static/scripts/ui/ that the vitest tests import. Until then this finds no covered mutants. 'break' is null so it never fails CI — the nightly job is informational. Legacy mootools scripts (the deprecated /old UI) are intentionally out of scope.
